zh.lifeSummary: 當Bertha van Holland於1054年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德弗拉爾丁恩時，她的父親Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland38歲，母親Gertrud Billung von Sachsen20歲。她於1072年與Philippe Ier roi des Francs結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1093年7月30日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯蒙崔易爾-素-梅享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bertha van Holland于1054年出生在荷兰-拉藍德弗拉爾丁恩时，她的父亲Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland38岁，母亲Gertrud Billung von Sachsen20岁。她于1072年与Philippe Ier roi des Francs结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1093年7月30日在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯蒙崔易爾-素-梅享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Holland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, French, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Holland, a province of the Netherlands.

English: habitational name from Downholland or Upholland (Lancashire), Hulland (Derbyshire), the Parts of Holland, one of the three administrative subdivisions of Lincolnshire, any of the four places called Hoyland (southern Yorkshire), and possibly Great and Little Holland (Essex). The placenames all derive from Old English hōh ‘heel, spur of land’ + land ‘land’.

English: habitational name either from Hoeland (Farm) in Bury (Sussex), or from Holland's Barn in Albourne (Sussex). The placename in Bury has the same etymology as in 1 above, while the placename in Albourne may derive from Old English hol ‘hole, hollow’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollands
meanings: English: variant of Holland , especially 3, with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Dutch: genitivized form of   Holland  .

variants.name: Howland
meanings: English: variant of   Holland  .
Americanized form of Norwegian   Hovland  .

History: Howland was the name of three Quaker brothers, original settlers in Marshfield, MA. They were from Huntingdonshire, England. The eldest, John Howland (c. 1593–1672) was a passenger on the Mayflower, servant to Gov. John Carver, who died in the first winter at Plymouth Colony.

variants.name: Hollander
meanings: Dutch (also Den Hollander), German (also Holländer), English, Swedish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Holland (see Holland 1).

variants.name: Holand
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Holland  .
Norwegian: habitational name from about twenty farmsteads so named, composed of Old Norse hár ‘high’ + land ‘land, field’, denoting a high-lying farm.

variants.name: Aland
meanings: Scandinavian (Åland): topographic name from the Åland Islands in the Gulf of Bothnia.

English: topographic name from Middle English atte lande (Old French laund) ‘dweller at the glade or pasture’, or sometimes perhaps, ‘dweller at the old cultivated land(s)’ from Old English eald, ald ‘old’ + land ‘land’.

variants.name: Hollon
meanings: English: altered form of   Holland  .

nameMeanings.name: Bertha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of a Continental Germanic name, a short form of various compound women's personal names derived from berht ‘famous’ (akin to Modern English bright). It probably existed in England before the Conquest, and was certainly reinforced by Norman use, but fell out of use in the 15th century. It was reintroduced into the English-speaking world from Germany in the 19th century, but has once again gone out of fashion.

en.lifeSummary: When Bertha van Holland was born in 1054, in Vlaardingen, South Holland, Netherlands, her father, Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland, was 38 and her mother, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, was 20. She married Philippe Ier roi des Francs in 1072. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 30 July 1093, in Montreuil-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bertha van Holland est née en 1054, à Vlaardingen, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Philippe Ier roi des Francs en 1072. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 30 juillet 1093, à Montreuil-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bertha van Holland 1054 in Vlaardingen, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland 38 und ihre Mutter Gertrud Billung von Sachsen 20. Sie hat 1072 Philippe Ier roi des Francs geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 30. Juli 1093 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Montreuil-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bertha van Holland è nata il nel 1054 nel Vlaardingen, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, sua padre, Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Philippe Ier roi des Francs nel 1072. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 luglio 1093, nel Montreuil-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bertha van Hollandが1054年にオランダズイド-hオランドvラアルディンジェンで生まれた時，父Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Frieslandは38歳，母Gertrud Billung von Sachsenは20歳であった。1072年にPhilippe Ier roi des Francsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1093年7月30日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスモントレウイル-スル-マーで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bertha van Holland(이)가 1054년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 블라아르딩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrud Billung von Sachsen(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1072년 Philippe Ier roi des Francs(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1093년 7월 30일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 몽레우이-수-머에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bertha van Holland nasceu em 1054, em Vlaardingen, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Philippe Ier roi des Francs em 1072. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 30 de julho de 1093, em Montreuil-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bertha van Holland родилась в 1054 г. в местности влаардинген, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, её отцу по имени Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philippe Ier roi des Francs в 1072 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 30 июля 1093 г. в местности монтреуил-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bertha van Holland nació en 1054, en Vlaardingen, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Floris I van Holland graaf van West-Friesland, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Gertrud Billung von Sachsen, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Philippe Ier roi des Francs en 1072. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de julio de 1093, en Montreuil-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 39 años.
